certificate_kind.author: Reviewing Attorney
certificate_kind.basis: recorded clerk's certificate under 10 M.R.S. § 3261 following the filing of a complaint to enforce a mechanic's lien; recorded within the § 3261(2) 60-day window

plaintiff_recital: Dana A. Moe d/b/a Jamie J. Noe
defendant_recital: Blake C. Moe and Quinn W. Poe
property_description: A certain lot or parcel of land with the buildings thereon, located at 12 Alex D. Poe, Eliot, County of York, State of Maine, being Lot 4 as shown on a plan recorded in the York County Registry of Deeds in Book 123, Page 45, and being the same premises described in a deed to Reese M. Poe and Reese W. Noe recorded in the York County Registry of Deeds in Book 16500, Page 210.
